projects.description: Clone of LMGTFY (Let Me Google That For You) but for ChatGPT

projects.name: Pyzlides
projects.description: Presentation creator using Python code. Vibe coded with Jetbrains Junie

projects.name: Just Grok It
projects.description: Migrate your current LLM API requests to xAI APIs with a single line of code.

talks.title: Building Federated GraphQL APIs in Python
talks.description: Demo of building Federated GraphQL APIs in Python using Apollo Federation and Graphene.

talks.title: Metaprogramming in Python using Metaclasses
talks.description: An introduction to metaprogramming in Python using metaclasses, with examples and use cases. Covered the `type` in Python, class creation internals, and the modern alternatives to metaclasses.

talks.title: Pygoat - Learn Django Security the hard way
talks.description: Pygoat is an open-source project that provides a vulnerable Django application for learning and practicing web application security. The session covered OWASP top 10 vulnerabilities in Django applications, with live demos using Pygoat.

talks.title: Everything is an object in Python
talks.description: Explored Python object model and how everything in Python is an object, including functions, classes, modules, and even types.

talks.title: Tackling Thread Safety in Python
talks.description: Explored the concept of race conditions, how Python’s GIL currently affects multithreading and covered steps to fix thread unsafe code using synchronization primitives.

talks.title: Goodbye GIL: Exploring the Free-threaded mode in Python
talks.description: The session explores the free-threaded mode of CPython 3.13+. We demo and assess the impact on single-threaded vs multithreaded code and test the performance across CPU-bound and I/O-bound tasks, aiming to identify scenarios where free-threaded Python excels.

talks.title: Improving in Chess using Python
talks.description: Chess game analysis and evaluation using Python `chess` library and Stockfish engine.
